_readme: Authoritative Local generation catalog. Templates are reasoning forms with typed slots; assignment targets constrain slot selection but do not create new templates.

strategies.name: Explain
strategies.prefix: Explain a project-specific use, relationship, or constraint supported by the supplied evidence.

strategies.name: Execution
strategies.prefix: Trace an evidenced interaction, data path, or code path.

strategies.name: Prediction
strategies.prefix: Determine an observable outcome from the shown condition and code.

strategies.name: Debugging
strategies.prefix: Reason about one explicit hypothetical change and the behavior it would break.

strategies.name: Modification
strategies.prefix: Choose a change that meets a concrete requirement while preserving shown behavior.

evidence_types.name: Module Graph
evidence_types.description: Source modules and their high-level organisation.

evidence_types.name: Data Flow
evidence_types.description: Functions and paths that move or transform data.

evidence_types.name: Control Flow
evidence_types.description: Functions and paths containing branches, loops, and state changes.

evidence_types.name: Symbol Table
evidence_types.description: Declared classes, functions, methods, and module-level symbols.

evidence_types.name: Complexity Analysis
evidence_types.description: Heuristic function-size, loop, branch, and call indicators.

evidence_types.name: Test Discovery
evidence_types.description: Discovered test files and test-like functions.

evidence_types.name: API Discovery
evidence_types.description: Routes, endpoints, requests, responses, and external communication.

evidence_types.name: SQL Analysis
evidence_types.description: SQL files, statements, schemas, and persistence operations.

templates.name: Contextual Use
stem_frames: Within {context}, which statement correctly describes the project-specific use of {subject}?
In {context}, which statement correctly describes what {subject} contributes to the project?
templates.option_task: Test the subject's evidenced interaction, input/output, side effect, or downstream contribution. Do not test generic library knowledge or repeat what its name suggests.
templates.query: project-specific use interaction input output side effect dependency

required.label: concrete usage
required.query: import call use publish subscribe request transform save table

templates.name: Interaction / Flow
stem_frames: Which statement correctly describes the evidenced interaction between {subject} and {counterpart}?
Which statement is consistent with the evidenced dependency from {subject} to {counterpart}?
Which statement correctly traces what passes from {subject} to {counterpart}?
templates.option_task: Test an evidenced direction, ordering, transferred data, or cross-component consequence. Every option must be a complete relational claim.
templates.query: workflow order interaction source destination call flow dependency

required.label: evidenced relationship
required.query: source destination call order data flow dependency

templates.name: Condition / Outcome
stem_frames: For the shown code, if {condition}, which observable behavior occurs?
templates.option_task: State exact calls, assignments, output, exceptions, or return behavior visible in the complete shown branch.
templates.query: condition branch state outcome exception return side effect

required.label: conditional code
required.query: if else try except match return set update

templates.name: Code Explain
stem_frames: Which statement correctly describes the complete effect of the shown code?
templates.option_task: Test the complete visible effect, including material calls, transformations, state changes, and return behavior.
templates.query: implementation effect transformation state return code

templates.name: Fault / Correction
stem_frames: A maintainer proposes to {mutation}. For the shown code, which statement correctly identifies the resulting fault and the correction?
templates.option_task: Exactly one option must pair the observable consequence of the explicit hypothetical mutation with the correction that restores the shown behavior. Do not claim the original code is faulty.
templates.query: hypothetical change consequence correction condition return call

templates.name: Requirement / Change
stem_frames: Requirement: {requirement}. At INSERT HERE in the shown code, which option satisfies it while preserving the existing behavior?
templates.option_task: Each option must be a short syntactically plausible snippet for the marked location. Exactly one must satisfy the stated requirement and preserve the visible control/data flow.
templates.query: requirement insert extend log validate preserve behavior

templates.name: Constraint / Verification
stem_frames: Which statement is consistent with the evidenced constraint on {subject}?
Which statement correctly describes the verified behavior of {subject}?
templates.option_task: Test a concrete schema rule, validation guard, test expectation, security condition, data-quality rule, or measured complexity indicator. Do not ask for an undocumented design preference.
templates.query: constraint validation assertion schema integrity guard complexity

required.label: verifiable constraint
required.query: constraint not null primary key assertion validate guard loop branch

topics.name: Architecture
topics.description: Internal components, boundaries, dependencies, and how project parts work together.
topics.query: architecture module package dependency layer component boundary structure

topics.name: Integration / API
topics.description: External APIs, services, message queues, contracts, payloads, failures, and retries.
topics.query: integration api endpoint request response client payload mqtt publish subscribe external service retry

topics.name: Workflow / Data Flow
topics.description: How control or data moves from inputs through processing stages to outputs.
topics.query: workflow data flow pipeline input output transform validate load save process stage

topics.name: Implementation / Code Logic
topics.description: Local rules, transformations, conditions, state changes, and implementation behavior.
topics.query: implementation code logic function condition state behavior transformation calculation

topics.name: Data Modelling
topics.description: Persistence, schemas, relationships, queries, constraints, and data integrity.
topics.query: database schema table query sql transaction persist model record relationship constraint

topics.name: Security
topics.description: Validation, authentication, authorization, secrets, and safe data handling.
topics.query: security authenticate authorize permission input validation secret token encrypt sanitize

topics.name: Testing
topics.description: Test cases, assertions, expected behavior, boundaries, and fault detection.
topics.query: test testing assertion fixture validate expected error boundary behavior

topics.name: Complexity
topics.description: Time, space, scalability, resource use, and performance implications.
topics.query: complexity performance efficient optimize scalability time space memory loop

topics.name: OOP
topics.description: Classes, objects, encapsulation, inheritance, composition, and collaboration.
topics.query: oop object class method inheritance composition interface encapsulation polymorphism
